# Spatial reliability

Any record with a spatial reliability greater than `r settings_clean$max_geo_rel` metres. 

In preparing for the analysis of South Australian ecosystems, spatial areas that lost many records through the spatial reliability filtering were identified. In these areas records were manually relocated to a location as close to the original as possible that conceptually aligned:

* aerial imagery
* plant species list
* relevant satellite data
* and, in some cases, the original mud-map from the survey

These relocated records had their [BDBSA](#bdbsa) location and spatial reliability adjusted so that they passed the spatial reliability filtering.

<br>
